hindi: निश्चय प्रेम प्रतीति ते, विनय करैं सनमान। तेहि के कारज सकल शुभ, सिद्ध करैं हनुमान॥
english: With full love and faith, whoever prays with devotion; Hanuman accomplishes all their good tasks
roman: Nishchay Prem Priti Te, Vinay Karain Sanman, Tehi Ke Karaj Sakal Shubh, Siddh Karain Hanuman

hindi: जय हनुमंत संत हितकारी। सुन लीजै प्रभु अरज हमारी॥
english: Victory to Hanuman, benefactor of saints; please listen to my prayer O Lord
roman: Jai Hanumt Sant Hitkari, Sun Lijah Prabhu Araj Hamari

hindi: जन के काज विलंब न कीजे। आतुर दौरि महासुख दीजे॥
english: Do not delay the task of your devotees; run quickly and grant great happiness
roman: Jan Ke Kaaj Vilamb Na Kije, Atur Dauri Mahasukh Dije

hindi: जैसे कूदि सिंधु महि पारा। सुरसा बदन पैठि बिस्तारा॥
english: As you leaped to cross the great ocean; entering and expanding within Surasa's mouth
roman: Jaise Koodi Sindhu Mahi Para, Surasa Badan Paithi Bistara

hindi: आगे जाय लंकिनी रोका। मारेहु लात गई संच लोका॥
english: Lankini blocked your path ahead; you kicked her and she left for the other world
roman: Aage Jay Lankini Roka, Marehu Lat Gai Sanch Loka

hindi: बज्र देह दानव दल मारो। रामचंद्र के काज सँवारो॥
english: With your thunderbolt body destroy the demon hordes; accomplish the work of Ramachandra
roman: Bajra Deh Danav Dal Maro, Ramchandra Ke Kaaj Sanvaro

hindi: जय जय जय हनुमान बलवाना। बज्रांगी बल बुद्धि निधाना॥
english: Victory to the mighty Hanuman; Bajrangi, treasure of strength and wisdom
roman: Jai Jai Jai Hanuman Balvana, Bajrangi Bal Buddhi Nidhana
